body:
This adds aerosol activation module based on [Abdul-Razzak and Ghan 2000](https://doi.org/10.1029/1999JD901161).

The PR comes with documentation and tests comparing with Fig. 1 from the original paper. You can preview the docs, along with the figure [here](https://clima.github.io/CloudMicrophysics.jl/previews/PR18/Aerosol_activation/)

The PR is an effect of the 2021 SURF project with @imdula and @Montu12345 .

Happy to take some reviews: @tapios , @szy21 , @claresinger, @charleskawczynski
title: Surf/aerosol activation
